description: Relationships and query examples for ecom database

RELATIONSHIP: order_items.order_id → orders.order_id

DESCRIPTION: Each order has multiple line items

JOIN_CONDITION: order_items.order_id = orders.order_id

SQL_PATTERN: JOIN orders ON order_items.order_id = orders.order_id

chunks.text:
QUESTION: Top 5 products by revenue

SQL:
SELECT p.product_name, SUM(oi.total_price) AS revenue
FROM order_items oi
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.order_status = 'Delivered'
GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_name
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 5

NOTES: Revenue = SUM(total_price). No discount_percent in order_items. order_status valid values: 'Cancelled', 'Delivered', 'Processing', 'Returned', 'Shipped'.

metadata.question: Top 5 products by revenue
metadata.text:
QUESTION: Top 5 products by revenue

SQL:
SELECT p.product_name, SUM(oi.total_price) AS revenue
FROM order_items oi
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.order_status = 'Delivered'
GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_name
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 5

NOTES: Revenue = SUM(total_price). No discount_percent in order_items. order_status valid values: 'Cancelled', 'Delivered', 'Processing', 'Returned', 'Shipped'.

chunks.text:
QUESTION: Revenue by product category

SQL:
SELECT p.category, SUM(oi.total_price) AS revenue
FROM order_items oi
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.order_status = 'Delivered'
GROUP BY p.category
ORDER BY revenue DESC

NOTES: products.category is a plain text column, not a FK.

metadata.question: Revenue by product category
metadata.text:
QUESTION: Revenue by product category

SQL:
SELECT p.category, SUM(oi.total_price) AS revenue
FROM order_items oi
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.order_status = 'Delivered'
GROUP BY p.category
ORDER BY revenue DESC

NOTES: products.category is a plain text column, not a FK.

chunks.text:
QUESTION: Total revenue last 30 days

SQL:
SELECT SUM(oi.total_price) AS total_revenue
FROM order_items oi
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.order_status = 'Delivered'
  AND o.order_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'

NOTES: Date filter on orders.order_date. Status filter on orders.order_status.

metadata.question: Total revenue last 30 days
metadata.text:
QUESTION: Total revenue last 30 days

SQL:
SELECT SUM(oi.total_price) AS total_revenue
FROM order_items oi
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.order_status = 'Delivered'
  AND o.order_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'

NOTES: Date filter on orders.order_date. Status filter on orders.order_status.

chunks.text:
QUESTION: Customer order history with spend

SQL:
SELECT c.first_name, c.last_name, COUNT(o.order_id) AS order_count,
       SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.first_name, c.last_name
ORDER BY total_spent DESC

NOTES: customers uses customer_id, first_name, last_name — no single name column.

metadata.question: Customer order history with spend
metadata.text:
QUESTION: Customer order history with spend

SQL:
SELECT c.first_name, c.last_name, COUNT(o.order_id) AS order_count,
       SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.first_name, c.last_name
ORDER BY total_spent DESC

NOTES: customers uses customer_id, first_name, last_name — no single name column.

chunks.text:
QUESTION: Current stock levels by product

SQL:
SELECT p.product_name, i.quantity_available, w.warehouse_name
FROM inventory i
JOIN products p ON i.product_id = p.product_id
JOIN warehouses w ON i.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id
ORDER BY i.quantity_available ASC

NOTES: Stock column is quantity_available. warehouses uses warehouse_name.

metadata.question: Current stock levels by product
metadata.text:
QUESTION: Current stock levels by product

SQL:
SELECT p.product_name, i.quantity_available, w.warehouse_name
FROM inventory i
JOIN products p ON i.product_id = p.product_id
JOIN warehouses w ON i.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id
ORDER BY i.quantity_available ASC

NOTES: Stock column is quantity_available. warehouses uses warehouse_name.

chunks.text:
QUESTION: Average product rating with review count

SQL:
SELECT p.product_name, ROUND(AVG(r.rating), 2) AS avg_rating,
       COUNT(r.review_id) AS review_count
FROM products p
JOIN reviews r ON p.product_id = r.product_id
GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_name
ORDER BY avg_rating DESC

NOTES: Table is reviews not product_reviews.

metadata.question: Average product rating with review count
metadata.text:
QUESTION: Average product rating with review count

SQL:
SELECT p.product_name, ROUND(AVG(r.rating), 2) AS avg_rating,
       COUNT(r.review_id) AS review_count
FROM products p
JOIN reviews r ON p.product_id = r.product_id
GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_name
ORDER BY avg_rating DESC

NOTES: Table is reviews not product_reviews.

chunks.text:
QUESTION: Payment method breakdown by transaction count and amount

SQL:
SELECT payment_method, COUNT(*) AS transaction_count,
       SUM(amount) AS total_amount
FROM payment_transactions
WHERE status = 'Completed'
GROUP BY payment_method
ORDER BY total_amount DESC

NOTES: Table is payment_transactions. payment_transactions.status valid values: 'Completed', 'Failed', 'Refunded'.

metadata.question: Payment method breakdown by transaction count and amount
metadata.text:
QUESTION: Payment method breakdown by transaction count and amount

SQL:

       SUM(amount) AS total_amount

GROUP BY payment_method
ORDER BY total_amount DESC

NOTES: Table is payment_transactions. payment_transactions.status valid values: 'Completed', 'Failed', 'Refunded'.

chunks.text:
QUESTION: Average delivery days by carrier

SQL:
SELECT carrier,
       COUNT(*) AS total_shipments,
       ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (actual_delivery - ship_date))/86400), 1) AS avg_days
FROM shipments
WHERE actual_delivery IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY carrier
ORDER BY avg_days ASC

NOTES: Table is shipments. Filter NULL actual_delivery before calculating.

metadata.question: Average delivery days by carrier

FROM shipments

GROUP BY carrier
ORDER BY avg_days ASC

NOTES: Table is shipments. Filter NULL actual_delivery before calculating.
